title: payment_watcher comment says step '3' but step '2' is absent — numbering gap
description: payment_watcher.rs activate_subscription(): the comment block reads '1. Write subscription...' then '3. Notify the client...' skipping 2. The missing step 2 was likely a now-deleted intermediate step (e.g. persist scan height). Remove the step numbers or renumber 1/2 to avoid confusion about missing logic.
